comment: FluidR3_GM Trombone — soundfont-rendered MP3 (engineered loop in source).
corrThreshold:0.99 (vs default 0.95) because the harmonic structure varies
just enough across the sample that 0.95 admits picks whose 3-period waveform
correlates 'OK but not perfect' with the anchor — clean enough for most uses
but audibly inconsistent on long sustained chords. 0.99 forces phase-perfect
coherence; trombone has more than enough valid picks to support it.
rmsStepThreshold:0.08 (vs default 0.25) catches volume-mismatched picks from
gradual breath-pressure drift that phase-coherence alone misses.
